title: RVPO: Risk-Sensitive Alignment via Variance Regularization
gist: Apple researchers propose RVPO, a critic-less RLHF method that penalizes inter-reward variance (via a LogSumExp/SoftMin operator) to prevent 'constraint neglect' in multi-objective alignment, improving HealthBench scores over GDPO without late-stage degradation.

insights.claim: Current critic-less RLHF methods aggregate multi-objective rewards via an arithmetic mean, leaving them vulnerable to constraint neglect: high success in one objective can numerically offset critical failures in others such as safety or formatting.
insights.speaker: Apple ML Research
insights.so_what: Identifies a safety-relevant blind spot in mainstream alignment methods — important for anyone assessing reliability of RLHF-tuned models.
insights.quote: high-magnitude success in one objective can numerically offset critical failures in others (e.g., safety or formatting), masking low-performing “bottleneck” rewards

insights.claim: Mean aggregation (GRPO/GDPO) treats outputs with critical constraint failures as mathematically identical to balanced outputs, blinding the optimizer to critical failures.
insights.speaker: Apple ML Research
insights.so_what: Concrete mechanism for why models can pass aggregate scores while silently failing safety constraints.
insights.quote: Mean aggregation (GRPO/GDPO) treats outputs with critical constraint failures (Gen A) as mathematically identical to balanced outputs (Gen B)

insights.claim: RVPO is a risk-sensitive framework that penalizes inter-reward variance during advantage aggregation, shifting the objective from 'maximize sum' to 'maximize consistency', with a LogSumExp (SoftMin) operator acting as a smooth variance penalty.
insights.speaker: Apple ML Research
insights.so_what: A drop-in aggregation change to enforce bottleneck constraints — a candidate technique for safety-critical alignment pipelines.
insights.quote: shifting the objective from “maximize sum” to “maximize consistency.”

insights.claim: On rubric-based reasoning with up to 17 concurrent LLM-judged reward signals, RVPO improves HealthBench scores to 0.261 vs 0.215 for GDPO at 14B (p < 0.001).
insights.speaker: Apple ML Research
insights.so_what: Statistically significant gain on a health-reasoning benchmark with many reward signals shows the method scales to dense multi-objective settings.
insights.quote: RVPO improves overall scores on HealthBench (0.261 vs. 0.215 for GDPO at 14B, p < 0.001)
insights.locator: By preventing the model from neglecting

insights.claim: RVPO maintains competitive accuracy on GPQA-Diamond without the late-stage degradation observed in other multi-reward methods, across model scales without sacrificing general capabilities.
insights.speaker: Apple ML Research
insights.so_what: Avoiding late-stage degradation is a practical training-stability win for multi-objective alignment.
insights.quote: maintains competitive accuracy on GPQA-Diamond without the late-stage degradation observed in other multi-reward methods
